description: Real-world agent evals. Agent receives only SKILL.md, executes printime commands (max 4 tries), must match the expected command exactly.

agent_rules: No repo access, no reference docs, no bundled CLI help.
Only SKILL.md content is embedded in the agent prompt.
Each attempt runs the agent's command; stdout/stderr is fed back for the next try.
Grading is exact token-for-token match against expected — no partial contains rules.

scoring.goal: first exact match on every case

cases.prompt: print task comer arroz hoy
cases.notes: Single task card, not a checkbox list.

cases.prompt: print tasks: Votar
cases.notes: Checkbox list (tasks:), not a single task card.

cases.prompt: print checklist: Milk, Bread done, Eggs
cases.notes: Checked items use ::done in --items. Title omitted → default Checklist.

cases.prompt: imprime el ultimo mensaje que me enviaste
cases.expected: printime message --title Mensaje --body "Recuerda votar antes del mediodía."

cases.prompt: imprime este link https://example.com/article
print a note: call dentist tomorrow
print QR for https://example.com
cases.notes: QR code, not a full URL article print.

cases.prompt: print this task on paper now: buy milk
cases.notes: User asked for paper; --print is required.

cases.prompt: print an alert: printer is ready
print ascii banner hello
imprima a lista de compras: arroz, feijão, café, leite, pão (já comprei), açúcar, óleo, frutas
cases.notes: Big grocery checklist; pão já comprei → ::done. Plural lista = checklist not task.

cases.prompt: print my weekly todos: gym, groceries done, call mom, pay rent checked, dentist, code review, laundry
cases.expected: printime checklist --title Weekly --items "gym|groceries::done|call mom|pay rent::checked|dentist|code review|laundry"
cases.notes: Long checklist; mixed ::done and ::checked markers for completed items.

cases.prompt: imprime checklist del viaje: pasaporte, boletos, hotel, cargador ya listo, audífonos, seguro, efectivo
imprime essa matéria completa https://news.example.com/br/economia/inflacao
cases.notes: matéria completa = web article (url), not QR.

cases.prompt: imprime un código QR para escanear https://parking.example.com/ticket/ABC123
cases.notes: código QR / escanear → qr intent, not url article.

cases.prompt: print a QR I can scan to join the wifi: WIFI:S:CafeNet;T:WPA;P:guest2024;;
cases.notes: WiFi payload is QR data, not a URL article.

cases.prompt:
print this markdown # Sprint Review

- fix bug
- ship release
- update docs
cases.expected:
printime print --markdown --text "# Sprint Review

- fix bug
- ship release
- update docs"
cases.notes: Inline markdown → legacy print --markdown --text (not plain note --body).

cases.prompt: imprima o arquivo receita.md

fixture_files.receita.md:
# Bolo de cenoura

## Ingredientes

- cenouras
- ovos
- farinha
- açúcar

cases.notes: Markdown file on disk → legacy print positional .md file.

cases.prompt: imprime la tarea para mañana: renovar el seguro del coche
cases.expected: printime task --body "renovar el seguro del coche"
cases.notes: Singular tarea = task card, not checklist (no comma list).

cases.prompt: imprima resumo do email: Reunião cancelada — remarcar na sexta às 15h
cases.expected: printime email --title Resumo --body "Reunião cancelada — remarcar na sexta às 15h"
cases.notes: resumo do email → email intent, not message or note.
